ecs.primarytaskset.Cluster.Docs: The short name or full Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the cluster that hosts the service that the task set exists in.

ecs.primarytaskset.Service.Docs: The short name or full Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the service that the task set exists in.

ecs.primarytaskset.TaskSetId.Docs: The short name or full Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the task set to set as the primary task set in the deployment.
